philosophy: A brand engineering skill assembles approved identity parts into one consistent, product-consumable system.
invariants: modular construction governed by one repeatable operation
one recognizable silhouette and one distinctive interruption
flat geometry remains legible in black and white at 32 pixels
negativeConstraints: no droplet, crystal, sparkle, magic wand, or generic AI symbol
no decorative material used to rescue weak geometry

symbolDirections.tension: independent brand assets versus one governed system
symbolDirections.distinctiveRule: different modular parts resolve into one silhouette while one join remains visibly in progress
heterogeneous parts align to one production register without becoming identical tiles

symbolDirections.tension: open composition versus controlled asset boundary
symbolDirections.distinctiveRule: an outer system contains distinct parts while a single opening signals extensibility

wordmarkDirections.tension: engineering precision versus approachable creative work
wordmarkDirections.distinctiveRule: selected terminals share one cut angle without reducing readability
counters repeat a parts grammar while exact spelling remains primary
one repeatable spacing event creates recognition without fragmenting the name

productionApplications.name: README hero background
productionApplications.usage: A calm repository header with a safe area for real HTML text and badges.
productionApplications.mechanism: Use the approved modular parts as a restrained assembly sequence on the right third.
productionApplications.scene: Flat print-craft composition, graphite field, paper and two accents, right-third activity, quiet left two-thirds, no generated text.

productionApplications.name: repository social preview background
productionApplications.usage: A legible repository preview that preserves a quiet copy area.
productionApplications.mechanism: Use one approved mark and a sparse subset of its modular parts.
productionApplications.scene: Flat 2:1 composition, mark center-left, controlled negative space, no generated text, no alternative logo.
